rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE DIANE CUSHMAN NEAL LEGACY TRUST DATED 12/27/07 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Diane Cushman Neal, Zachary Neal And Ashley Neal'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Respondents' Motion to Quash Service of Summons is DENIED. Probate Code Sections 17000, 17003 give the Court jurisdiction over which issues concerning the internal affairs of the Trust benefificiaries. Respondents' Motion to Stay Action on Grounds of Inconvenient Forum is DENIED. There are genuine councerns relating to the suitability of Colorado as an alternative forum. Additionally, the concentration of witnesses in California and involvement of a California limited partnership and land situated in California weigh against allowing the litigation to proceed in Colorado. The prevailing party must submit a proposed order. Any party choosing to contest the tentative must notify the Court and opposing counsel no later than February 24, 2016, at 4:00 p.m.
